blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Sauna / Heat Exposure Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: HIGH BO: r/Sauna 120K + r/longevity 450K + r/HubermanLab 236K. Sauna apps are session timers (SteamPunk, Sauna Timer). NONE track consecutive-day STREAK. Huberman/Rhonda Patrick audience follows strict sauna protocols (4x/week, 20 min). Zero streak accountability app. Premium biohacker demographic = high willingness to pay.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Red Light Therapy Session Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: HIGH BO: r/redlighttherapy 170K + r/biohacking 400K. Red light therapy apps are session timer apps (RLT Timer). Device apps (Joovv, BioMax) are product-specific. Zero streak accountability layer. Growing market — RLT device sales grew 340% 2022-2025. Premium biohacker audience. Probably zero dedicated streak apps.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Morning / Evening Gratitude Ritual Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: BO hypothesis: r/gratitude 163K + r/Meditation 700K + r/morningroutine 500K. Gratitude JOURNALING apps exist (Gratitude, Five Minute Journal). Gratitude RITUAL (structured practice: gratitude + affirmation + intention) is a distinct use case. No ritual-focused streak app. Note: gratitude_message_streak (C072) was BO — this is different behavior.

blue_ocean_niches.label: Daily Bed Making / Morning Discipline Streak
blue_ocean_niches.hypothesis: HIGH BO: r/theXeffect 580K + r/selfimprovement 2.5M. 'Make your bed first' is a keystone habit (Jocko Willink, Admiral McRaven book with 10M+ copies sold). r/theXeffect is literally a streak accountability community. No dedicated app for this specific habit exists. Keystone habit = gateway to larger habit ecosystem. Could anchor a multi-habit streak app.
